prompt: A cinematic action movie still on a sunny waterfront dock in Miami, shot in a vertical composition. In the foreground, a tough athletic man in his 30s stands in a wide defensive stance, aiming a black semi-automatic pistol with both hands directly off-frame. He has short dark hair, a rugged build, tan skin, light stubble, a silver wristwatch, a white T-shirt, an open short-sleeve blue patterned overshirt, and tan cargo pants. Slightly behind and to his left stands an athletic woman in her 20s or 30s with tan skin and long dark curly hair tied in a high ponytail. She wears a fitted black tank top, denim shorts, a black belt, layered gold necklaces, and holds a black handgun low at her side, ready for action. Set them on a weathered wooden pier beside bright blue water, with 1 large palm tree on the left, 3 modern high-rise buildings in the background, and 1 partially visible police boat on the right edge. Bright midday sunlight, clear blue sky, glossy skin highlights, tense body language, realistic proportions, shallow depth of field, high-detail photorealism, blockbuster buddy-cop energy, crisp focus on the characters, slightly blurred skyline.
